perturbation.original_text: 1. PRIMARY SPONSOR. For the 1998 racing season, Logan's shall be the primary sponsor of the Team, which fields a LMSC racing vehicle (the "Race Car") driven by Brad Baker. During the term of this Agreement, SRP will not represent any other product or company or accept as a primary, secondary, associate or contingent decal sponsor any other product reasonably deemed by Logan's to be competitive with Logan's.
perturbation.changed_text: 1. PRIMARY SPONSOR. For the 1998 racing season, Logan's shall be the primary financial backer of the Team, which fields a LMSC racing vehicle (the "Race Car") driven by Brad Baker. During the term of this Agreement, SRP will not represent any other product or company or accept as a primary, secondary, associate or contingent decal sponsor any other product reasonably deemed by Logan's to be competitive with Logan's.
perturbation.explanation: The change from 'primary sponsor' to 'primary financial backer' introduces ambiguity. While a 'sponsor' typically implies a mutually beneficial relationship involving promotion and visibility, a 'financial backer' suggests a purely monetary role. This undermines the implied promotional obligations throughout the agreement. Specifically, it is contradicting the fact that Logan's expects a promotion benefit, by the wording on section 4.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. ASSOCIATE AND SECONDARY SPONSORSHIPS. SRP shall have the right to obtain secondary and associate sponsors for the Race Car and Team, subject to the approval of Logan's, which approval shall not be unreasonably withheld. SRP may not obtain any associate or secondary sponsors whose products or concepts compete with Logan's. Any associate and/or secondary sponsor may promote its role as a sponsor by signage, logos or trademarks on the Race Car, provided that such associate and/or secondary sponsors signage, logos or trademarks used on the Race Car, when viewed collectively, shall not cover any area greater than 25% of that of Logan's signage, logos or trademarks, nor conflict with the graphic design, or in other locations or on clothing as may be permitted by the terms of the Agreement. Logan's shall have the exclusive use of the hood, the rear quarter panel area above the tire and the bottom of the deck lid (rear facing panel, TV panel) of the Race Car, as shown on Exhibit C to this Agreement. All other areas permitted by NASCAR for sponsor signage, logos or trademarks and the "spoiler space" are reserved for NASCAR, SRP and the associate and secondary sponsors. All associate and secondary sponsors' graphic layouts for the Race Car are subject to Logan's approval, which shall not be unreasonably withheld. Furthermore, SRP shall not permit any associate or secondary sponsor to suggest in any manner that its sponsorship role is as great as that of Logan's.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly identifies Logan's as a 'primary sponsor,' implying a reciprocal relationship involving both financial contribution and promotional benefits. The changed text, by describing Logan's as the 'primary financial backer,' shifts the focus solely to financial support, diminishing the implied promotional obligations. This directly contradicts section 4, which outlines the rights and limitations of secondary sponsors regarding signage and promotion, predicated on Logan's being the primary sponsor with corresponding promotional rights. The change weakens Logan's expected return benefits from the sponsorship, and creates uncertainty as to its rights over the car.

perturbation.original_text: 3. SERVICES TO BE PROVIDED BY SRP. SRP shall perform the following services for Logan's in connection with race programs: (A) THE DRIVER. Except as specifically provided in this Agreement, Brad Baker ("Baker") will be the only driver for the Team for the term of this Agreement. If Baker is unavailable to perform as driver as a result of injury, illness or any other disability, or cause beyond his control, SRP shall provide an alternate driver subject to the approval of Logan's ("Alternate Driver"), which approval shall not be unreasonably withheld. Baker and any Alternate Driver appointed by SRP and approved by Logan's pursuant to this Agreement are herein collectively 1 2 referred to as the "Driver." The Driver shall not drive for any other sponsor which competes with Logan's. The Driver shall not drive any other race vehicle for any other sponsor than Logan's without prior written notice from SRP to Logan's.
perturbation.changed_text: 3. SERVICES TO BE PROVIDED BY SRP. SRP shall perform the following services for Logan's in connection with race programs: (A) THE PILOT. Except as specifically provided in this Agreement, Brad Baker ("Baker") will be the only pilot for the Team for the term of this Agreement. If Baker is unavailable to perform as pilot as a result of injury, illness or any other disability, or cause beyond his control, SRP shall provide an alternate pilot subject to the approval of Logan's ("Alternate Pilot"), which approval shall not be unreasonably withheld. Baker and any Alternate Pilot appointed by SRP and approved by Logan's pursuant to this Agreement are herein collectively 1 2 referred to as the "Pilot." The Pilot shall not drive for any other sponsor which competes with Logan's. The Pilot shall not drive any other race vehicle for any other sponsor than Logan's without prior written notice from SRP to Logan's.
perturbation.explanation: Switching 'Driver' to 'Pilot' introduces ambiguity. While 'driver' clearly refers to the person operating the race car, 'pilot' is more commonly associated with aircraft. This creates confusion as to the intended role and responsibilities, specifically contradicting section 7 and what is related to the trademarks to be used by the 'Driver'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 7. TRADEMARKS. It is expressly understood that SRP may use the Logan's trademarks, logos or other symbols only as directed or approved by Logan's and that Logan's may use the trademarks, logos, symbols, name, likeness, voice or signature of the Driver, the Team or any secondary or associate sponsor only as directed or approved by the Driver, or secondary sponsors, as appropriate. SRP may license and use the Logan's name and Trademark in promotions directly related to the Race Car or the Team, such as souvenir items, hats, shirts, etc. Upon termination of this Agreement, SRP and any associate or secondary sponsors shall immediately cease all use of all Logan's trademarks, trade names, service marks, logos, symbols or other designations, and Logan's shall immediately cease all use of trademarks, trade names, service marks, logos, symbols or other designation of SRP or any associate or secondary sponsors, as well as any and all use of name, likeness, voice or signature of the Driver.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Driver' to 'Pilot' introduces a significant ambiguity regarding the role of the person operating the race vehicle. While the original text clearly defines the role as 'Driver' in the context of race programs, the changed text uses 'Pilot,' which typically refers to someone who operates an aircraft. This contradicts section 7, which refers to the 'Driver' when outlining the usage of trademarks related to the driver's name, likeness, voice, or signature. The inconsistency makes it unclear whose trademarks are being referenced, creating a direct conflict and uncertainty within the document.

perturbation.original_text: 12. RELEASE. Except as may be otherwise provided in this Agreement, including amounts due SRP from Logan's under Article 6 of this Agreement, neither SRP nor its employees or agents shall make any claims against Logan's with respect to any remuneration in the nature of salary or otherwise for any cost, damage, loss or expense incurred for any reason, including, but not limited to, damage, injury or death which may be suffered by SRP or its employees or agents, third parties, or any property of SRP or property of its agents or employees, or property of any third parties. SRP shall obtain from the Driver and from each of its employees who is a member of the Team a release in favor of Logan's from all liability with respect to any of the above.
perturbation.changed_text: 12. RELEASE. Except as may be otherwise provided in this Agreement, including amounts due SRP from Logan's under Article 6 of this Agreement, neither SRP nor its employees or agents shall make any claims against Logan's with respect to any remuneration in the nature of salary or otherwise for any cost, damage, loss or expense incurred for any reason, including, but not limited to, damage, injury or death which may be suffered by SRP or its employees or agents, third parties, or any property of SRP or property of its agents or employees, or property of any third parties. SRP shall obtain from the racer and from each of its employees who is a member of the Team a release in favor of Logan's from all liability with respect to any of the above.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Driver' to 'racer', introduces ambiguity. This is because 'racer' implies someone who engages in racing activities generally, which could include activities outside of SRP's obligations under this agreement, and the release might not cover those activities, particularly those racing with different sponsors (conflicts section 3 and the 'Driver').
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3. SERVICES TO BE PROVIDED BY SRP. SRP shall perform the following services for Logan's in connection with race programs: (A) THE DRIVER. Except as specifically provided in this Agreement, Brad Baker ("Baker") will be the only driver for the Team for the term of this Agreement. If Baker is unavailable to perform as driver as a result of injury, illness or any other disability, or cause beyond his control, SRP shall provide an alternate driver subject to the approval of Logan's ("Alternate Driver"), which approval shall not be unreasonably withheld. Baker and any Alternate Driver appointed by SRP and approved by Logan's pursuant to this Agreement are herein collectively 1 2 referred to as the "Driver." The Driver shall not drive for any other sponsor which competes with Logan's. The Driver shall not drive any other race vehicle for any other sponsor than Logan's without prior written notice from SRP to Logan's.
perturbation.justification: The original text uses the term "Driver" and the modified text changed it to "racer." The contradicted text in Section 3 defines "Driver" specifically as Brad Baker or an Alternate Driver approved by Logan's and prohibits the "Driver" from driving for other sponsors. The change to "racer" introduces ambiguity because "racer" could encompass any racing activity, potentially outside the scope of SRP's services and Logan's sponsorship, thereby conflicting with Section 3's restrictions on the Driver's activities. This creates a contradiction because the release might not cover these extra activities, especially those racing with different sponsors.
